prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低录取位次分别为约3173名→4331名→2260名→4953名→2352名，波动较大。2023年因招生批次调整和工科试验班大类招生，位次大幅前移至2260名；2024年因新高考改革首年（物理类/历史类分科），位次后移至4953名；2025年回升至2352名，接近2023年水平。近两年整体呈前移趋势，2025年基准约2352名；该校在广西理科/物理类招生计划：2021年36人、2022年36人、2023年42人、2024年38人、2025年47人；2026年计划43人，较2025年减少4人（缩招约8.5%），计划缩减对竞争有一定缓解作用，位次有望前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（威海）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属哈尔滨工业大学体系。软科中国大学主榜中哈尔滨工业大学排名近年稳定在12–16名（2026年第12名），威海校区共享校本部品牌声誉与学科资源，属于国内顶尖工科院校梯队；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情冲击；抖音热度排名总榜第10位（高热），综合热度约454万，短视频平台曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续升温，可能加剧竞争。2024年曾出现投档线异常信号（中关注），但2025年已回升，未形成持续负面效应；哈尔滨工业大学（校本部）第五轮学科评估中拥有A+学科（力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程等）及A类学科（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、仪器科学与技术等）共17个A-及以上学科。威海校区开设的工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班、机器人与智能装备拔尖班、智能制造卓越优才计划）及软件工程等专业，均对应校本部A类优势学科，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等核心工科专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续被评为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，社会报考热度高。广西2026年物理类考生估算约26.9万人（较2025年26.0万增加约3.3%），考生规模扩大使整体竞争略有加剧。；哈尔滨工业大学（威海）位于山东省威海市，非本省高校。该校在广西的招生计划占比较小（2025年物理类47人），属于跨省招生，受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2352名、2026年计划缩招8.5%、广西物理类考生增加约3.3%、抖音高热关注度及工科专业持续高热等关键因素，缩招效应与竞争加剧效应部分对冲后，预计2026年最低录取位次约2262名，较2025年小幅前移约90名。位次区间考虑学校层次（Top985）和历史波动，预测为2004–2520名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 软件工程（卓越优才计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智能制造卓越优才计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2262名，区间2004–2520名。位次在区间前段（2004–2200名）可重点冲刺一档的AI领军班和机器人与智能装备拔尖班；位次在区间中段（2200–2400名）以二档软件工程为主力；位次在区间后段（2400–2520名）以三档智能制造卓越优才计划保底。卓越优才计划虽投档线较低，但转专业范围受限，需结合个人发展规划选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this subject category were approximately 3173 → 4331 → 2260 → 4953 → 2352, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to adjustments in enrollment batches and the introduction of engineering experimental class major enrollment, the ranking moved significantly forward to 2260; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform (physics/history category division), the ranking moved back to 4953; in 2025, it rebounded to 2352, close to the 2023 level. In the past two years, the overall trend has been forward, with a baseline of approximately 2352 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Guangxi: 36 in 2021, 36 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 38 in 2024, 47 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 43, a decrease of 4 from 2025 (a reduction of about 8.5%), which may alleviate competition to some extent, and the ranking is expected to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, belonging to the Harbin Institute of Technology system. In the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, Harbin Institute of Technology has ranked steadily between 12th and 16th in recent years (12th in 2026). The Weihai campus shares the brand reputation and disciplinary resources of the main campus, belonging to the top tier of domestic engineering universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion impact; the Douyin popularity ranking is 10th on the overall list (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of about 4.54 million, high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting increasing attention from applicants, which may intensify competition. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line (medium attention), but it rebounded in 2025, without forming a sustained negative effect; Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus) has A+ disciplines (Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, etc.) and A disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, etc.) in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with a total of 17 disciplines rated A- or above. The engineering experimental classes (AI plus Advanced Technology Leading Class, Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class, Intelligent Manufacturing Excellence Talent Program) and software engineering and other majors offered at the Weihai campus correspond to the main campus's A-class advantageous disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently rated as "highly recommended" or "recommended" in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social application heat. The estimated number of physics category candidates in Guangxi in 2026 is about 269,000 (an increase of about 3.3% from 260,000 in 2025), and the expansion of the candidate pool slightly intensifies overall competition. Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, not a local university in this province. The university's enrollment plan in Guangxi accounts for a small proportion (47 in the physics category in 2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2352, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 8.5%, the increase in Guangxi physics category candidates by about 3.3%, the high Douyin popularity, and the sustained high heat of engineering majors, the reduction effect and competition intensification effect partially offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be approximately 2262, a slight forward movement of about 90 places compared to 2025. Considering the university level (Top 985) and historical fluctuations, the ranking range is predicted to be 2004–2520.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI plus Advanced Technology Leading Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing Excellence Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 2262, with a range of 2004–2520. Candidates with rankings in the front part of the range (2004–2200) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 AI Leading Class and Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class; those in the middle part (2200–2400) should target Tier 2 Software Engineering as the main choice; those in the back part (2400–2520) should use Tier 3 Intelligent Manufacturing Excellence Talent Program as a safety option. Although the Excellence Talent Program has a lower admission score line, the scope for changing majors is limited, so candidates need to consider their personal development plans when choosing.
